title: CartLimiter
description: A plugin that can cap the amount of damage a tnt minecart can do!
body:
this plugin allows you to change the max damage of a TNT Minecart

# **Features**
> ✅ Change Max Damage of TNT Minecart

# **Config**
```
# Maximum damage a TNT minecart can deal
max-damage: 8.0
```
